sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88000" key="promerimna/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προμεριμνάω</orth>, <sense id="n88000.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take thought before,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τί λαλήσητε</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg002.perseus-grc1:13:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ev.Marc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
